mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.title, LEFT(regexp_replace(c.body, '<[^>]*>', '', 'g'), 200) AS summary, c.created_at, t.name AS tag FROM content c JOIN topic t ON c.topic_id = t.id ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT c.id, c.title, c.body, c.created_at, t.name AS tag FROM content c JOIN topic t ON c.topic_id = t.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
